summary: Implemented Implied Volatility Skew as dimension 11 in the Decifer signal engine. Based on Wu & Tian (2024, Management Science): OTM put IV − ATM call IV reflects both structural risk characteristics and short-term informed order flow, predicting next-period returns.
files_changed: iv_skew.py (new) — standalone module: Alpaca OptionHistoricalDataClient, ATM call / OTM put selection by delta, skew = otm_put_IV - atm_call_IV, day-keyed cache, scored 0-10

signals.py — compute_confluence: added iv_skew_score/iv_skew_dir params, dim 11 scoring block, _ic_breakdown, _dim_dirs, score_breakdown, MTF hard-gate return. fetch_multi_timeframe: calls get_iv_skew when flag enabled. _regime_multipliers: iv_skew=1.0 (regime-neutral).
config.py — dimension_flags[iv_skew]=False (disabled until IC proven), iv_skew config block with DTE range, delta targets, and skew scoring thresholds.
ic_calculator.py — added iv_skew to DIMENSIONS list (now 10 dims, equal weight = 0.10)
tests/test_iv_skew.py (new) — 21 tests: scoring logic, client gating, chain parsing, result structure, caching
tests/test_ic_calculator.py — updated hardcoded 9-dim assertions to use len(DIMENSIONS)
tests/test_ic_weighted_direction.py — updated N_DIMS, _equal_weights, and EXPECTED_DIMS to include iv_skew
design_decisions: Disabled by default (dimension_flags.iv_skew=False) — IC must prove predictive value before enabling. Consistent with social dim pattern.
Fetched inside fetch_multi_timeframe per-symbol (not batch), guarded by the flag check. Zero-cost no-op when disabled.
Expiry selection: closest to 30 DTE from [7,60] day window — avoids gamma-dominated near-term noise.
ATM call: delta closest to 0.50. OTM put: delta closest to -0.25.
Regime-neutral multiplier (1.0 in both routing states) — structural options signal, not momentum-specific.
next_steps: Enable dimension_flags.iv_skew=True on paper account once ALPACA_API_KEY is confirmed working.
Monitor IC accumulation — expect 30-60 days before meaningful weight assignment.
After 100+ trades, check if iv_skew IC > 0.03 (Phase 2 noise floor). If yes, weight confirmed.
